message:
Running command: # Find pdk_root and nc_lib_root
echo "=== Looking for pdk_root ==="
find / -maxdepth 6 -type d -name "sky130*" 2>/dev/null | head -10
find / -maxdepth 6 -type d -name "pdk" 2>/dev/null | head -10
echo ""
echo "=== Looking for nc_lib_root / nc_chipgen ==="
which nc_chipgen 2>/dev/null || echo "nc_chipgen not on PATH"
find / -maxdepth 8 -name "nc_chipgen" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -10
echo ""
echo "=== Environment variables ==="
env | grep -iE "pdk|nc_lib|chipgen|nc_root|proj" | sort

function.name: execute_bash

args.command:
# Find pdk_root and nc_lib_root
echo "=== Looking for pdk_root ==="
find / -maxdepth 6 -type d -name "sky130*" 2>/dev/null | head -10
find / -maxdepth 6 -type d -name "pdk" 2>/dev/null | head -10
echo ""
echo "=== Looking for nc_lib_root / nc_chipgen ==="
which nc_chipgen 2>/dev/null || echo "nc_chipgen not on PATH"
find / -maxdepth 8 -name "nc_chipgen" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -10
echo ""
echo "=== Environment variables ==="
env | grep -iE "pdk|nc_lib|chipgen|nc_root|proj" | sort
